title: Aether Portal
description: A simple and rare aether portal structure with special loot from the aether
body:
# Aether Portal Structure

Features:

**Activated (non-functial) Aether Portal spawning rarely in selected Biomes:**
- Plains
- Snowy Plains
- Birch Forest

**Loot in Aether Chest such as:**
- Raw Copper 50% chance
- Copper Ingot 20% chance
- Glowstone Dust 10% chance
- Feather Falling II Book 10% chance
- Diamond 5% chance
- Aether Chicken Egg 2% chance
- Cloud 2% chance

## Custom Items
**Aether Chicken Egg:**
    A custom item which is a blue egg having a 2% chance of being in the aether loot chest and when used, spawns a big cold chicken which has very low gravity and high jump strength

**Cloud:**
  A glowy cloud spawning in the aether loot chest, which when held in main or offhand applies a low gravity effect to the player and reduces all fall damage while being held
